ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_media_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of social media channel (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "handles" (
  "handle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each handle */,
  "handle_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media handle */,
  "handle_type" TEXT /* Type of handle (e.g., personal, business, organization) */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media channel associated with the handle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the handle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the handle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_handles_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES social_media_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sources" (
  "event_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event source */,
  "event_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the event source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type associated with the event */,
  "handle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the handle associated with the event */,
  "event_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event source associated with the event */,
  "event_text" TEXT /* Text of the event (e.g., tweet, post, comment) */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL of the event */,
  "event_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the event image */,
  "event_video_url" TEXT /* URL of the event video */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_handle_id FOREIGN KEY ("handle_id") REFERENCES handles ("handle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_source_id") REFERENCES event_sources ("event_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_source_details" (
  "event_source_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event source detail */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the source detail */,
  "event_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event source associated with the source detail */,
  "directly_from_source" INTEGER /* Whether the event came directly from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_source_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_source_details_event_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_source_id") REFERENCES event_sources ("event_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_source_details_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, marketer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of filter (e.g., keyword, hashtag, handle) */,
  "filter_value" TEXT /* Value of the filter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_filters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_filter_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter that matched the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that matched the filter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_filter_matches_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_filter_matches_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES event_filters ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart, pie chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_integration_settings" (
  "integration_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the integration setting */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., CRM, marketing automation) */,
  "integration_settings" TEXT /* Settings for the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_integration_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
